series_metadata.series_title: Master Settlement Agreement E-Mail Address Form
series_metadata.series_description: E-mail addressess of those individuals requesting notification about updates to the list of approved brands on the Ohio Attorney Generals web site.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 5 yrs expiration of calendar yr in which received or such time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year. ; Electronic: 5 yrs expiration of calendar yr in which received or such time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year
